page_content:
4. Students will engage in physical activities both within their formal curriculum with the goal of asserting the importance of lifelong physical activity.

5. Students will integrate their physical activity experiences with kinesiology sub-disciplinary knowledge of exercise physiology.

REQUIREMENTS At least nine credits must be at the 300 or 400 level. Please note that many of the upper-level courses have prerequisites. Students should have completed MATH113 or higher, or have a minimum eligibility for MATH120, in order to take any necessary prerequisite courses for this minor.
